results.rendered_html: 2. duriṣṭa (2. duṣ + 2. iṣṭa) adj. was im Opfer verfehlt ist (Gegens. sviṣṭa)  TBR. 1,2,5,3 . agnirmā duriṣṭātpātu  TS. 1,6,3,1 . viṣṇurvai yajñamya duriṣṭaṃ pāti varuṇaḥ sviṣṭam  AIT. BR. 3,38 .  ŚAT. BR. 4,5,1,6 .  PAÑCAV. BR. 15,1 .
